ul.li: Memory Ordering: Atomic increments on rcv_nxt must use memory_order_release.
Deadlock Avoidance: Lock hierarchy: Socket Lock -> TCB Lock.
Interrupt Context: Execute in SoftIRQ context. Minimal stack (< 1KB).
Sequence Wrap: Use TCP_SEQ_LT(a, b) macros for 32-bit unsigned wrapping.

g.text: Reject if ACK or RST set
If count > thr -> Use SYN Cookies
Create new TCB from slab allocator
